title: 读取虚拟机的配置与资源分配
code:
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }
$vsms=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
# --- ComputerSystem -> (Msvm_SettingsDefineState) -> Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData ---
# $vm 为已存在的 Msvm_ComputerSystem;经 SettingsDefineState 关联取当前(已实现)VSSD。
$vssd = $vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData','Msvm_SettingsDefineState',$null,$null,$null,$null,$false,$null) | Select-Object -First 1
$vssdObj = [wmi]$vssd.__PATH
# ElementName / VirtualSystemSubType / Version
$vssdObj.ElementName; $vssdObj.VirtualSystemSubType; $vssdObj.Version
# --- ProcessorSettingData ---
$proc = [wmi]($vssdObj.GetRelated('Msvm_ProcessorSettingData') | Select-Object -First 1).__PATH
$proc.VirtualQuantity; $proc.Reservation; $proc.Limit; $proc.Weight
# --- MemorySettingData ---
$mem = [wmi]($vssdObj.GetRelated('Msvm_MemorySettingData') | Select-Object -First 1).__PATH
$mem.VirtualQuantity; $mem.DynamicMemoryEnabled
# --- 所有资源分配(控制器/设备) ---
$rasd = @($vssdObj.GetRelated('Msvm_ResourceAllocationSettingData'))
$rasd | ForEach-Object { '{0} {1}' -f $_.ResourceType, $_.ResourceSubType }
title_en: Read a Virtual Machine's Configuration and Resource Allocation
notes_en: Key association: Msvm_ComputerSystem is associated through Msvm_SettingsDefineState to the current (realized) Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData. Snapshot settings are also VSSD, so constraining the association class with SettingsDefineState retrieves only the current configuration and avoids inadvertently picking up checkpoint settings.

On the VSSD, GetRelated directly retrieves Msvm_ProcessorSettingData and Msvm_MemorySettingData (one each), as well as Msvm_ResourceAllocationSettingData (all controllers and devices). An empty generation 2 virtual machine contains 4 RASD by default: virtual keyboard, serial controller, synthetic mouse, and synthetic keyboard, all with ResourceType 13.
Memory VirtualQuantity is in MB (default 1024); CPU VirtualQuantity is the number of vCPUs; Limit=100000 represents 100% (measured in units of one-thousandth of a percent).
GetRelated returns shallow objects; you must run [wmi] on their .__PATH to obtain the full instance before you can reliably read all properties.
This operation is purely read-only. Simply substitute $vm with the target Msvm_ComputerSystem; no writes are produced.
A generation 2 virtual machine has VirtualSystemSubType Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2; configuration version Version=12.0 is the Windows Server 2025 default.
code_en:
$ns='root\virtualization\v2'
function Wait-Job2($p){ if(-not $p){return 7}; $j=[wmi]$p; while($j.JobState -eq 3 -or $j.JobState -eq 4){Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 200; $j=[wmi]$p}; return $j.JobState }
$vsms=Get-WmiObject -Namespace $ns -Class Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService
# --- ComputerSystem -> (Msvm_SettingsDefineState) -> Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData ---
# $vm is an existing Msvm_ComputerSystem; retrieve the current (realized) VSSD through the SettingsDefineState association.
$vssd = $vm.GetRelated('Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData','Msvm_SettingsDefineState',$null,$null,$null,$null,$false,$null) | Select-Object -First 1
$vssdObj = [wmi]$vssd.__PATH
# ElementName / VirtualSystemSubType / Version
$vssdObj.ElementName; $vssdObj.VirtualSystemSubType; $vssdObj.Version
# --- ProcessorSettingData ---
$proc = [wmi]($vssdObj.GetRelated('Msvm_ProcessorSettingData') | Select-Object -First 1).__PATH
$proc.VirtualQuantity; $proc.Reservation; $proc.Limit; $proc.Weight
# --- MemorySettingData ---
$mem = [wmi]($vssdObj.GetRelated('Msvm_MemorySettingData') | Select-Object -First 1).__PATH
$mem.VirtualQuantity; $mem.DynamicMemoryEnabled
# --- All resource allocations (controllers/devices) ---
$rasd = @($vssdObj.GetRelated('Msvm_ResourceAllocationSettingData'))
$rasd | ForEach-Object { '{0} {1}' -f $_.ResourceType, $_.ResourceSubType }
output:
CREATED VM path=\\WIN-OMK556K17QL\root\virtualization\v2:Msvm_ComputerSystem.CreationClassName="Msvm_ComputerSystem",Name="65DC9856-6807-4149-856F-A70FF052A931"
VSSD ElementName=WMITEST_read_vm_settings SubType=Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2 Version=12.0
PROC VirtualQuantity=1 Reservation=0 Limit=100000 Weight=100
MEM VirtualQuantity=1024 DynamicEnabled=False
RASD count=4
  RASD ResourceType=13 ResourceSubType=Microsoft:Hyper-V:Virtual Keyboard
  RASD ResourceType=13 ResourceSubType=Microsoft:Hyper-V:Serial Controller
  RASD ResourceType=13 ResourceSubType=Microsoft:Hyper-V:Synthetic Mouse
  RASD ResourceType=13 ResourceSubType=Microsoft:Hyper-V:Synthetic Keyboard
RESULT: PASS
CLEANUP destroyed rv=4096
notes: 关键关联: Msvm_ComputerSystem 经 Msvm_SettingsDefineState 关联到当前(已实现)的 Msvm_VirtualSystemSettingData。快照设置同样是 VSSD,用 SettingsDefineState 限定关联类可仅取当前配置那一条,避免误取检查点设置。
在 VSSD 上用 GetRelated 直接获取 Msvm_ProcessorSettingData 与 Msvm_MemorySettingData(各一条),以及 Msvm_ResourceAllocationSettingData(所有控制器与设备)。第二代空虚拟机默认含 4 条 RASD: 虚拟键盘、串口控制器、合成鼠标、合成键盘,ResourceType 均为 13。
内存 VirtualQuantity 单位为 MB(默认 1024);CPU VirtualQuantity 为 vCPU 数;Limit=100000 表示 100%(以千分之一百分比为刻度)。
GetRelated 返回的是浅对象,需对其 .__PATH 再执行 [wmi] 获取完整实例,才能稳定读取全部属性。
该操作为纯读操作。将 $vm 替换为目标 Msvm_ComputerSystem 即可,不产生任何写入。
第二代虚拟机 VirtualSystemSubType 为 Microsoft:Hyper-V:SubType:2;配置版本 Version=12.0 为 Windows Server 2025 默认。
